name: memo-init-spec-workshop
description: Private, non-published multi-namespace spec workshop (Memo 064 flatten): the 4 memo-init spec namespaces (memo, workbench, session, meta-spec) authored here with a self-contained generator, then promoted to the public repos/spec container.

scripts.build: npm run generate-refs && npm run generate-docs-payload && npm run generate-bridge && npm run generate-manifest && npm run generate-harness-skills && npm run check-bridge-inverse && npm run generate-llms-txt
